summary: Iteration 49: All 6 demo features verified. Backend: 20/20 tests pass. Frontend: All 6 features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Aggregate banner doesn't appear immediately when clicking 'All Campuses' - requires page refresh. This is because localStorage changes in the same tab don't trigger the storage event listener.

feature_a_campus_switcher.details: Campus switcher shows 'All Campuses' option at top. Clicking it sets localStorage 'campus_mode' = 'all'. After page refresh, aggregate banner displays with campus breakdown stats (Total Members, Active Groups, Kids Checked In, MTD Giving). Exit Aggregate View button works.

feature_b_platform_godmode.details: Platform admin (admin@solomonai.us) sees enhanced header 'Solomon AI Platform', 6 KPI cards (Churches: 5, Total Members: 84,500, Platform MRR: $339,910, MRR: $7,000, ARR: $84,000, Organizations: 1), and Organizations tab with Org->Campus hierarchy.

feature_c_manual_kids_checkin.details: Blue '+ Manual Check-In' button appears in Kids Check-in header. Clicking opens modal with search field, classroom dropdown (Sunday School, Nursery, Preschool, Elementary, Youth Room), and list of available children with Check In buttons.

feature_d_cafe_enterprise.details: Portal cafe page has pure white/enterprise aesthetic with no emojis. Clean Stripe-like card layout for menu items (Latte, Cold Brew, Blueberry Muffin). Cart button opens sidebar with pickup time selector, notes field, giving nudge, and checkout button.

feature_e_csv_member_import.details: Import CSV button on /people redirects to /admin/members/import with 4-step wizard (1. Upload, 2. Map Columns, 3. Preview, 4. Import). Step 0 shows upload dropzone with CSV format tips. Backend endpoints /admin/members/import/parse and /execute work correctly.

feature_f_communications.details: Communications page has tabs: Compose, Sent, Scheduled, Templates, Segments. Compose form has channel toggle (Email/SMS), recipients dropdown, subject input, message body with merge fields, schedule datetime picker, and Send Now button. Quick Templates and Quick Segments sidebars present.

action_items: MINOR: Fix aggregate banner to appear immediately when 'All Campuses' is clicked (without requiring page refresh). Add a custom event or state management to trigger re-render.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 demo features have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoints for CSV import, aggregate dashboard, and communications are working correctly
Cafe page has clean enterprise aesthetic without emojis as requested
Communications page has all required tabs and compose form fields
Kids Check-in manual modal has search and classroom selection as specified
seed_data_creation: Created test communications during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified all 6 demo features: A) Campus Switcher with All Campuses aggregate view (works after refresh), B) Platform God Mode with enhanced KPIs and Organizations tab, C) Manual Kids Check-In button and modal, D) Cafe Enterprise Redesign with Stripe aesthetic, E) CSV Member Import 4-step wizard, F) Communications page with Compose/Sent/Scheduled/Templates/Segments tabs. All backend APIs working. Minor UX issue: aggregate banner requires page refresh to appear.
